## Upstream Compatibility Checklist

- [ ] Upstream default config still works unchanged (`npx @agentskb/cli mcp`)
- [ ] Tool names/semantics unchanged (`ask_question`, `preflight_check`, `search_questions`, `get_stats`)
- [ ] Any new behavior is opt-in (env var / flag) and documented
- [ ] Change is upstreamable (or clearly fork-specific)
